overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through rural farmland in overcast, rainy weather. The character traverses wooden boardwalks, dirt paths, and rows of tobacco crops in an atmospheric, misty Louisiana-style bayou environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: marshy grassland with elevated wooden boardwalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a weathered wooden boardwalk through tall grass and oak trees

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank path weathered gray with moss between boards
large live oak trees draped with hanging Spanish moss
tall green and yellow marsh grass surrounding the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated wooden boardwalk through a marshy grassland. Spanish moss hangs from oak trees on either side while tall grass sways in the overcast, rainy atmosphere.

events.description: steps off wooden boardwalk onto muddy dirt ground

agents.ego_description: continuing forward on a dirt path alongside weathered wooden fences

entered.detail: muddy dirt trail with rain puddles and wagon ruts
weathered split-rail wooden fence marking field boundaries

segments.scene_description: Leaving the wooden walkway, the character walks on a muddy dirt path lined with wooden split-rail fences. The terrain transitions from marsh to farmland as crop fields become visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: tobacco plantation with planted crop rows

events.description: enters dense tobacco field walking between rows of mature plants

agents.ego_description: walking between rows of tall tobacco plants with large broad leaves

entered.detail: rows of mature tobacco plants with large green and yellow-veined leaves
rows of mature tobacco plants with large green and yellow-veined leaves

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense tobacco field, navigating between rows of mature plants with broad leaves. The crop rows create a corridor effect as rain continues to fall on the muddy path.

events.description: exits tobacco field into open grassy area with distant buildings visible

agents.ego_description: walking through open grassland toward distant farm structures

entered.detail: grassy trail with patches of mud through open pasture
farm structures visible on the horizon through the rain and mist

segments.scene_description: Exiting the crop field, the character walks through open grassland with farm buildings visible in the misty distance. The terrain opens up again as the path continues toward the rural settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy bayou that gradually transitions from a wild marshland into a cultivated rural settlement. It begins with the character traversing an elevated wooden boardwalk flanked by oak trees and hanging Spanish moss amidst swaying tall grass. As the character leaves the walkway, the terrain shifts to a muddy dirt path lined with split-rail fences, signaling a move from the marsh toward distant farmland. The scene then narrows as the camera follows the character through a dense tobacco field, where rows of broad-leaved plants create a corridor effect under the persistent rain. Finally, the path exits the crops and opens back into wide grassland, revealing farm buildings emerging through the misty distance.
